title: Turning items to subitems
excerpt:
How can I change an existing item to become a subitem? 
How can I change an existing subitem to become an item?

posts.author: AmirCodex (Amir Shapira)
posts.cookedHtml:
How can I change an existing item to become a subitem?
How can I change an existing subitem to become an item?

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @AmirCodex - Welcome to the community! Currently you cannot swap item “types” between main Items and SubItems. However, this is eventually coming as SubItem functionality gets more built out. Technically SubItems are still in beta, so stay tuned for more functionality later this year and early 2021.

posts.author: lausam (lauren s)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @PolishedGeek ,
I’m looking for the same utility as AmirCodex. I’ve noticed that when I right clik an item, the 8th option in the pop up menu is “convert to subitem” but it is grayed out. So it looks like the functionality is there. How does one activate it?
Thanks!

posts.author: Hayes (Hal)
posts.cookedHtml: +1 for this feature! Tasks often get added that then turn into more complex processes. Then we’re left with a bunch of items that really should all be a subitems of a larger idea.

posts.author: adibar (adi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @monday-team,
Is there anything new regarding this feature?

posts.author: simon_blinno (Simon Blickenstorfer)
posts.cookedHtml:
The feature will come soon. It is already visible but not yet clickable

The roadmap says Q2.
https://view.monday.com/480751376-c22b2fe6c069076f55f20289b4d3f04f

image2187×40 7.46 KB

posts.author: adibar (adi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you Simon!
I thought it was planned to be done in Q1.
I can’t wait for it

posts.author: simon_blinno (Simon Blickenstorfer)
posts.cookedHtml:
No problem!

Yes I also believe it was planned for Q1. It seems that it was pushed back.
But it is already noticeable, so it will surely come soon.

image852×150 19.3 KB

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey everyone! Thanks for the feedback on this one. I’m definitely going to pass it to my team and I appreciate the information about your concrete use cases. Those use cases are often really convincing to our product team. I’ll keep you updated as soon as I get more information!

@simon_blinno @adibar @Hayes @lausam @AmirCodex

posts.author: bricker211 (Colin Miller)
posts.cookedHtml: I also want this feature

posts.author: naamal (Naama)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, Can you please update if Its possible now?

posts.author: bricker211 (Colin Miller)
posts.cookedHtml: I am waiting for this feature too… I like to make the whole list of tasks and then start grouping them into categories or larger projects. Right now I have to do it in notes, organize everything, and then transfer it over to Monday!
